query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `job_alerts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tradespersonId` int NOT NULL,
  `tradeCategory` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `postcode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `radiusMiles` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `minBudget` int,
  `maxBudget` int,
  `enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 48bP948WRihkgKd.root --database 3Q9CEa3cTyEZW32bcCWGQo --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `job_alerts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tradespersonId` int NOT NULL,
  `tradeCategory` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `postcode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `radiusMiles` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `minBudget` int,
  `maxBudget` int,
  `enabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
